case_title: SCHOLTZ, JEANNE vs. KOPPLE, JAMES et al

docket_entries.description: 9:00AM DEPT 7, JUDGE MCBRIDE. C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT, PLTF PRESENT THROUGH COUNSEL, DEFTS FAILING TO APPEAR. ORAL AND DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE GIVEN. CAUSE SUBMITTED. COURT RULES JUDGMENT FOR PLTF. PLTF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
